name: Yaak
description: Yaak — OSS native desktop REST and GraphQL API client with offline-first design and environment variable support.

seo.title: Yaak — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Yaak: Yaak — OSS native desktop REST and GraphQL API client with offline-first design and environment variable support.

when_to_use: OSS REST API client for offline-first development
GraphQL query testing with environment variables
Native desktop alternative to Postman without data lock-in
API collection management with local storage
Team API workspace with Git-friendly export format

pros: Native desktop app, faster than Electron-heavy rivals
Offline-first with local data, no cloud lock-in
Open source under MIT, self-hostable sync
Handles REST, GraphQL, and gRPC in one client
Environment variables with proper secret handling
cons: Small community vs Postman or Insomnia
No team collaboration features in free tier
Plugin ecosystem still thin and immature
Windows and Linux builds less polished than macOS
review.verdict: A lean, OSS Postman alternative for devs who want local-first speed over cloud collaboration features.
review.best_for: Solo devs and privacy-focused teams wanting a fast offline REST and GraphQL client
review.not_for: Large teams needing shared workspaces, mock servers, or CI-integrated test runners
